rationale: Eight years of software engineering (cloud infra, Java backend, test automation) with zero production ML or IR experience; AI exposure is entirely self-learner/API-tinkering level, and current role is at fictional company Pied Piper.

Only 2.9 years of experience, current role is Sales Executive at fictional company Stark Industries, with a career consisting solely of customer support team lead work and no engineering or ML background.

Eight-year career consists entirely of non-technical roles (content writing, HR management, operations) at IT services firms (TCS, Wipro) and fictional company Stark Industries, with no engineering or ML work despite inflated skill listings.

Career is entirely accounting, operations management, and marketing roles at multiple fictional companies (Stark Industries, Wayne Enterprises) with no technical or ML engineering experience whatsoever.

Strong data engineering foundation with IIT Bombay tier_1 education and product company stints at Razorpay and Flipkart, plus Qdrant skills, but explicitly self-describes as wanting to transition into ML with only self-directed projects rather than production IR or ranking systems delivered.

Entire seven-plus year career is in non-technical project management, marketing, accounting, and operations roles exclusively at fictional companies (Hooli, Wayne Enterprises), with AI exposure limited to recent online courses on RAG and LangChain experimentation.
